description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The front facade features a combination of white and wood paneling, a single main door, a large window, and a small landscaped area with greenery and stone. The sides of the house are mostly solid, with a few horizontal window slits and a mix of white and reddish-brown panels. The rear of the house has a large window and a green lawn area, suggesting a backyard. The roof is flat with a skylight or roof access hatch visible. The overall design emphasizes geometric simplicity and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and wood paneling, large windows, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a large window, wood accents, and a small landscaped area with stone and greenery.
description_view_1: Side view displaying long, horizontal reddish-brown panels, a solid white upper section, and a glimpse of the front landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large window, white facade, and a green lawn area extending from the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with mostly solid white walls, a small window slit, and a partial view of the front entry and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with wood trim, adjacent large window, small steps, and a landscaped area with stone and greenery.
